channel.title: Um Actually
channel.description: Latest releases from Um Actually on Dropout.tv

item.title: 90s Television
item.description:
Danielle, Joey, and Justin head back to the 90s and try to sabotage one another.

Duration: 29:31

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, trivia, pop culture, superfans, nerds, internet, game shows, unscripted, jumping the shark, how it happened, this vs that, one of these things is not like the other, joey clift, danielle radford, justin michael

item.title: SlayerFest '25
item.description:
Buffy superfans Beth, Ruha, and Jeremy return to Sunnydale and discuss why Xander is the worst.

Duration: 30:48

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, trivia, pop culture, superfans, nerds, internet, game shows, unscripted, jumping the shark, how it happened, this vs that, one of these things is not like the other, jeremy lambert, beth may, ruha taslimi
